title: CodeGrind: AI-assisted login and new authentication flow
summary: Showcase the new Google authentication integration and AI-assisted onboarding flow, focusing on secure sign-in, profile sync, and a smoother first-run experience.
core_message: CodeGrind now offers a streamlined authentication experience with Google sign-in, OAuth 2.0 security, and an AI-assisted onboarding flow to help new users get productive faster without friction.
cta: Try the new Google sign-in today and complete your profile in under a minute.
visual_brief: Short 20–40 second explainer video showing the sign-in flow: user clicks 'Sign in with Google', OAuth prompts, profile setup screen with stats, and a welcome dashboard. Include UI hints: OAuth 2.0 badge, secure icons, and a cyberpunk-themed onboarding screen re: CodeGrind features.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind introduces AI-assisted login and a streamlined onboarding flow. Try Google sign-in, secure OAuth 2.0, and a faster first-run setup that gets you productive in minutes. Explore the new authentication experience and complete your profile quickly at codegrind.online.

bluesky_company.text: CodeGrind introduces AI-assisted login and a streamlined onboarding flow. Try Google sign-in, secure OAuth 2.0, and a faster first-run setup that gets you productive in minutes. Explore the new authentication experience and complete your profile quickly at codegrind.online.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind launches an AI-assisted login and onboarding flow featuring Google sign-in and OAuth 2.0 security. See a smoother first-run experience, faster profile setup, and synced profiles for immediate productivity. Learn more and try the new sign-in today at the CodeGrind site: https://codegrind.online
